mapper.insert: INSERT INTO short_link( short_code, original_url, status, expire_time, visit_count )VALUES( #{shortCode}, #{originalUrl}, #{status}, #{expireTime}, #{visitCount} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, short_code AS shortCode, original_url AS originalUrl, status, expire_time AS expireTime, visit_count AS visitCount, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM short_link WHERE short_code = #{shortCode}
